title: ilex denticulata
intro: Ilex denticulata, also known as Japanese holly or spiny-leaf holly, is a species of evergreen shrub native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves which contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex denticulata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Ilex denticulata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support liver health and boost the immune system.
